# GEO Decision Course

GEO Decision Course is a waitlist landing page for an AuditUniversePro course about AI visibility diagnosis and business decision-making.

The page offers a free AI Visibility Triage, a 15-minute diagnostic structure for separating AI cannibalization, content decay and technical visibility issues.

The course is built for founders, marketers, consultants and operators who need clearer evidence before spending on AI search or SEO fixes.

The course does not guarantee AI rankings. AI answers are dynamic and cannot be guaranteed.

AuditUniversePro is the provider. The main site is https://audituniversepro.com/.

Canonical URL: https://course.audituniversepro.com/

Important sections:
- Free AI Visibility Triage waitlist form: https://course.audituniversepro.com/#waitlist
- Course outline: https://course.audituniversepro.com/#course
- Prime Steak & Wine case evidence: https://course.audituniversepro.com/#proof
- FAQ: https://course.audituniversepro.com/#faq
